full_text:
Li Su 李肅
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Su (李肅). Using Red Hare and other gifts he persuaded Lü Bu to kill Ding Yuan and join Dong Zhuo. Li Su was affiliated with Dong Zhuo and Lu Bu. Li Su lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
